properties.Test Case: This task uses some special test code in Bloom that is activated by editing one of the books in a special collection, but only if you are in a Debug build or of the environment variable BloomSandbox is set to yes. So make sure one of those is true. May not work in a release build even with BloomSandbox set. Unzip the "Fake Error Report Collection" (See Bloom Team/Testing/Bloompacks). Open the books one by one. Verify error messages according to screenshots. [N.B. willing to live with BL-12226.]
properties.Steps:
This task uses some special test code in Bloom that is activated by editing one of the books in a special collection, but only if you are in a Debug build or of the environment variable BloomSandbox is set to yes. So make sure one of those is true. May not work in a release build even with BloomSandbox set.
Unzip the "Fake Error Report Collection" (See Bloom Team/Testing/Bloompacks). Open the books one by one. Verify error messages according to screenshots. [N.B. willing to live with BL-12226.]

properties.Test Case: try ALT-TABing away from the error dialogue -- the error dialogue shouldn't disappear from view (should stay on top of Bloom)
properties.Steps: - try ALT-TABing away from the error dialogue -- the error dialogue shouldn't disappear from view (should stay on top of Bloom)
